prompt: I'm looking at selling puts on SOFI - IV seems elevated. Do a full screen on it.
assertions: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report has an Options Analysis section that is more than 20 lines
Report mentions IV Rank or IV Percentile with numeric values in the options analysis
Report specifically evaluates the put-selling strategy the user asked about
Report recommends for or against selling puts with reasoning tied to IV environment
Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit action (BUY/SELL/HOLD or options strategy)
Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report has a Valuation Summary section with multiples
Report has fundamental analysis providing context for the options play
Report has a Sources section with references
Report contains actual current SOFI price data (not fabricated)
Report presents multiple named options strategies or strike/expiry alternatives
Report includes risk factors or invalidation criteria specific to the options position
